title: Hemionitis hookeri
taxonomy: Hemionitis hookeri is classified under the family Polypodiaceae. It is a species of fern in the genus Hemionitis. This genus belongs to the division Pteridophyta and the phylum Pteridophyta. Hemionitis hookeri is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales. It is native to parts of Asia.
uses: Hemionitis hookeri is known to have various medicinal properties, with its leaves and roots used in traditional medicine in different regions. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. In traditional medicine, it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Additionally, its leaves are also used as a treatment for digestive problems and respiratory issues. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal potential of Hemionitis hookeri.
